Public sources support pet-friendly terms, in-unit laundry, dishwasher, AC, concierge, package service, controlled access, video patrol, abundant parking, EV charging, and unusually strong public pricing disclosure through both Greystar and Apartments.com. The main caution is not missing features but mixed long-tail operations signal. Apartments.com shows strong ratings, but Birdeye exposes at least one detailed complaint around hot water, elevator downtime, and understaffed maintenance. Noise also remains a real question because the property sits at La Brea and Hollywood and Apartments.com gives it a Busy 65 SoundScore, even though the building advertises floor-to-ceiling double-paned windows.
